html:
📰 每日 AI 新聞 Top 10 · 2026-07-20
1. China Forms Global AI Governance Body, 29 Nations Join政策
中國籌組全球AI治理組織，29國加入
China's foreign ministry announced that representatives from 29 countries, including China, Kazakhstan, Laos, Pakistan, Russia and Indonesia, signed an agreement in Shanghai to establish the World Artificial Intelligence Cooperation Organisation (WAICO). The new intergovernmental body aims to promote international AI cooperation and global governance.
中國外交部宣布，包括中國、哈薩克、寮國、巴基斯坦、俄羅斯及印尼在內的29國代表在上海簽署協定，成立世界人工智慧合作組織（WAICO）。該獨立政府間組織總部設於上海，旨在促進AI國際合作及全球治理。
iThome · 原文連結
2. Hackers Use Old-School "Text Salting" to Fool New AI Email Defenses資安
駭客用傳統文字加鹽手法，騙過新式AI郵件防護
Security firm Barracuda revealed that attackers are using a traditional spam-evasion technique called "Text Salting" to bypass machine learning and LLM-powered email security tools. Barracuda has detected over 1 million related phishing attacks since April, mostly disguised as retail loyalty points or gift card notifications.
資安業者Barracuda揭露，駭客正利用傳統的「文字加鹽」手法，干擾由機器學習及大型語言模型驅動的郵件防護工具。自今年4月以來已偵測到逾100萬次相關釣魚攻擊，主要偽裝成零售業點數或禮品卡通知。
iThome · 原文連結
3. NotebookLM Rebrands as Gemini Notebook, Merges Into Gemini App and Search產品
NotebookLM改名Gemini Notebook，整合進Gemini App和Google搜尋中
Google announced that the popular NotebookLM will be renamed Gemini Notebook, remaining a standalone app while also integrating into the Gemini App and Google Search for cross-app note syncing. Since its 2023 debut as Project Tailwind, NotebookLM has attracted 30 million users and over 600,000 enterprise organizations.
Google宣布廣受歡迎的NotebookLM將更名為Gemini Notebook，除維持獨立App外，也將整合進Gemini App與Google搜尋，方便跨App同步筆記。NotebookLM自2023年以Project Tailwind問世以來，已有3,000萬用戶及逾60萬企業組織使用。
iThome · 原文連結
4. What to Watch After Jensen Huang's Japan Visit產業
黃仁勳訪日之後，接下來要留意什麼
Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang left Tokyo with deals spanning Japan's entire tech ecosystem, from chipmakers to robotics and telecom firms. The visit signals deepening AI infrastructure partnerships between Nvidia and Japanese industry.
輝達執行長黃仁勳結束東京行程，帶著橫跨日本整個科技生態系的合作案，從晶片製造商到機器人與電信業者皆有涉及，顯示輝達與日本產業在AI基礎建設上的合作正持續加深。
TechCrunch · 原文連結
5. Could an Apple Lawsuit Derail OpenAI's Hardware Plans?產業
蘋果的訴訟是否會打亂OpenAI的硬體計畫？
TechCrunch's Equity podcast debates whether Apple's lawsuit could cast a shadow over OpenAI's much-discussed plans to launch hardware and go public. The case raises questions about intellectual property and competitive boundaries in the AI hardware race.
TechCrunch的Equity podcast討論蘋果提起的訴訟是否會影響OpenAI備受關注的硬體計畫與上市規劃。此案也引發外界對AI硬體競賽中智慧財產權與競爭界線的關注。
TechCrunch · 原文連結
6. OpenSSL's HollowByte DDoS Flaw Can Be Triggered With an 11-Byte Payload研究
OpenSSL存在DDoS漏洞HollowByte，11位元組酬載即可癱瘓運作
OpenSSL's June update fixed 18 vulnerabilities, headlined by a high-risk flaw discovered with the help of Anthropic's Claude AI tool. Security researchers now say the team quietly patched an unlisted flaw in the same release that lets attackers halt OpenSSL with just an 11-byte payload if left unaddressed.
OpenSSL在6月的更新中修補了18個資安漏洞，其中一個高風險漏洞是借助Anthropic的Claude AI工具發現。資安公司近日指出，同次更新其實還默默修補了一個未登記CVE的漏洞，攻擊者僅需11位元組酬載即可讓OpenSSL停止運作。
iThome · 原文連結
7. Sophos Consolidates Product Lines to Build an AI-Native Cybersecurity Platform產品
彙整旗下資安產品線，Sophos打造AI原生網路安全防禦系統
As AI reshapes both cyber threats and defenses, Sophos is consolidating and expanding its security product portfolio to address both "Security for AI" and "AI for Security." The move responds to the rapid rise of powerful AI models capable of sophisticated attack and defense operations.
隨著AI大幅驅動網路威脅與防護領域發展，Sophos正彙整並擴展旗下資安產品線，同時因應「AI安全」與「AI強化資安」兩大趨勢。此舉回應具備強大攻防能力的頂尖AI模型快速崛起。
iThome · 原文連結
8. 'Odyssey' Director Christopher Nolan Calls AI an Obvious 'Trojan Horse'產業
《奧德賽》導演諾蘭稱AI是明顯的「特洛伊木馬」
Director Christopher Nolan warned that AI's rapid adoption resembles a Trojan horse, cautioning that "everybody knows the Greeks are inside." His comments add to growing debate in Hollywood over AI's disruptive role in filmmaking.
導演克里斯多福諾蘭警告，AI的快速普及就像一匹特洛伊木馬，強調「每個人都知道希臘人已經在裡面了」。他的言論再度引發好萊塢對AI衝擊電影產業角色的討論。
TechCrunch · 原文連結
9. Will AI Fix Prior Authorization—or Make It Worse?產業
AI能改善保險預先授權流程，還是讓情況更糟？
The U.S. government is piloting a program that uses AI to help make insurance prior-authorization coverage decisions. Critics worry the technology could speed up denials as easily as approvals, raising stakes for patients navigating the healthcare system.
美國政府正試辦一項利用AI協助保險預先授權承保決策的計畫。批評者擔心該技術在加速核准的同時，也可能同樣加速拒絕給付，對病患權益影響重大。
Ars Technica · 原文連結
10. Nonprofit Current AI Races to Build a "World Wide Web" of AI, Free for All產業
非營利組織Current AI力拚打造「AI版全球資訊網」，免費開放使用
Current AI, a nonprofit dedicated to building AI systems that don't leave any culture behind, has made notable progress across devices, AI chat and more. The group aims to offer an open, freely accessible alternative to commercial AI platforms.
非營利組織Current AI致力打造不遺漏任何文化的AI系統，目前已在裝置端、AI聊天等多個面向取得顯著進展，目標是提供開放且免費使用的AI替代方案，對抗商業AI平台的壟斷。
TechCrunch · 原文連結
由 AI News Digest 從各家 RSS 自動挑選、翻譯並寄送
